name: agentic-sdlc
description: AI-powered SDLC pipeline plugin for Claude Code and Copilot

plugins.name: agentic-sdlc
plugins.description: Supervisor-orchestrated agent fleet that takes a business requirement through BA → TDD → Implement → Deploy → E2E. Includes 8 specialist agents, 9 reusable skills, safety hooks, and a Copilot bridge. Java/Spring Boot defaults with parameterized tech-stack overrides.
